  "findings": [
    "EMT conduit lacks required support within 3 feet of the outlet box."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Install an approved conduit support (such as a one-hole strap or mineralac hanger) within 3 feet of the box before continuing with wire pulling or further installation."
  ],
  "rationale": "NEC Section 358.30(A) requires EMT to be securely fastened in place at least every 10 feet and within 3 feet of each outlet box, junction box, device box, cabinet, conduit body, or other tubing termination. Because the support is missing, the installation is non-compliant and must be corrected before the run is completed and inspected.",
  "references": [
    "NEC Article 358.30(A)"
  ]
}
